creator: amdmi3@mail.ru
text:
* Vasil Dimov (vd@FreeBSD.org) wrote:
> The new version (dunno about old one) is creating
> /usr/X11R6/etc/settings directory during the build process.
Yes, that's why miwi@ didn't commit it.
The named dir is created my some of QT tools, uic or moc. I've noticed
it created bt many qt apps (version of qpxtool that's currently in
ports, games/stroq, possibly other ports). I currently have no idea how
to fix this behavior, but I guess, I'll have to investigate this case
after all. Currently I think problem is in qt, not in ports that use it.

-- 
Best regards,
 Dmitry                          mailto:amdmi3@mail.ru
